name: Harvest Table Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
Prep the pastry for a 2-crust 9-inch pie. Fill the bottom shell with 6 medium apples, sliced. Combine the remaining ingredients and pour over the apples. Cover with the top crust and bake in an oven set to 425°F for 45 minutes, or until the crust is browned.
Topping: Mix the ingredients together, spread over the top of the pie. Return it to the oven for 10 minutes, or until the topping is bubbly. Place the pie pan on a larger pan to catch any topping that may run off.
